## Meeting Purpose

[Run through Augment Code website updates for adding guides section and MCP directory.](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two main tasks: 1) Add guides section (duplicate of blog) 2) Integrate MCP directory from Code Library](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Tech stack: Sanity CMS (cloud-hosted), Vercel for deployment, GitHub for code repos](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [GrowthX team (Kirkland) to prototype designs, Augment Code team to review/refine](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

## Topics

### Website Structure and Tech Stack

  - [Two repos: .com (main site) and .com CMS (Sanity schema)](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Sanity cloud-hosted, queries defined in .com repo](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Vercel for deployment, GitHub for version control](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Existing content types: rich text, images, YouTube videos, code blocks](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### Guides Section Implementation

  - [Duplicate blog post content model in Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Change slug for new guides section](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Reuse existing query structure from blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [GrowthX team to prototype design, mirroring blog layout initially](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Augment Code team to review and refine design later](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

### MCP Directory Integration

  - [Create new schema for MCP pages in CMS repo](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Build corresponding query in .com repo](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [GrowthX to prototype UI elements, pulling data from Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Consider hero section with enhanced UI for MCP pages](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Design Considerations

  - [Augment Code aesthetic: terminal-esque, ASCII references, technical look](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [GrowthX team encouraged to take design liberties for guides section](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Augment Code designer (Meghan) to review and refine later](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Project Communication

  - [New dedicated Slack channel to be created for this project](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Include Chris, Kirkland, George, and Meghan (designer)](https://fathom.video/share/gsxRfSCsyghpRCYnfzaUMQ7AxUqkDM_x?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
